Question 1: Chapters. Does the text list main sections? It mentions some sections but not all. Probably incomplete. So fails.

Question 2: Description: Does text briefly describe contents of each section? Yes it gives a short description of each: introduction covers cloud computing, second section peripheral computing concept, third section serverless solutions, etc. So it does.

Question 3: Structure: Can it be easily understood what is general structure just from this text? It gives sequence: intro, second, third, then further. But might not fully show structure of whole thesis. It's somewhat clear but maybe not fully. Likely can understand general structure. So true.
